zh.Rise And Withernwick In Holderness, Engl: 英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Fauconberg於1264年出生在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓時，他的父親Lord Walter de Fauconberge44歲，母親Agnes de Brus36歲。他至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他於1348年在英國越可爾被列為chaplain of catefoss。他去世於1348年4月在英國越可爾卡特福斯享年84歲。

zh-hans.Rise And Withernwick In Holderness, Engl: 英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Fauconberg于1264年出生在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓时，他的父亲Lord Walter de Fauconberge44岁，母亲Agnes de Brus36岁。他至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他于1348年在英国越可爾被列为chaplain of catefoss。他去世于1348年4月在英国越可爾卡特福斯享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Fauconberg was born in 1264, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Lord Walter de Fauconberge, was 44 and his mother, Agnes de Brus, was 36. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1348, at the age of 84, his occupation is listed as chaplain of catefoss in Yorkshire, England. He died in April 1348, in Catfoss, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 84.

fr.Rise And Withernwick In Holderness, Engl: Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Fauconberg est né en 1264, à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Lord Walter de Fauconberge, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Brus, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1348, à l’âge de 84 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est chaplain of catefoss à Everwyck, Angleterre. Il est décédé en avril 1348, à Catfoss, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.Rise And Withernwick In Holderness, Engl: Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Fauconberg 1264 in Skelton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Walter de Fauconberge 44 und seine Mutter Agnes de Brus 36. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1348, als er 84 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als chaplain of catefoss in Yorkshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb im April 1348 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Catfoss, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Fauconberg è nato il nel 1264 nel Skelton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Lord Walter de Fauconberge, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Brus, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1348, all'età di 84 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come chaplain of catefoss nel Yorkshire, England. Morì nel aprile 1348, nel Catfoss, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Fauconbergが1264年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンで生まれた時，父Lord Walter de Fauconbergeは44歳，母Agnes de Brusは36歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。1348年，84歳の時，イギリスヨークシュアイアでの職業はchaplain of catefossと記録されている。彼は1348年4月にイギリスヨークシュアイアカトフォスで84歳で死去した。

ko.Rise And Withernwick In Holderness, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 리스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Fauconberg(이)가 1264년 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Walter de Fauconberge(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Brus(은)는 36세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1348년, 84세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 요르크실르에서 chaplain of catefoss이었다. 그는 1348년 4월 영국 요르크실르 카트포스에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Rise And Withernwick In Holderness, Engl: Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Fauconberg nasceu em 1264, em Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Walter de Fauconberge, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Brus, tinha 36 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1348, com 84 anos, sua profissão aparece como chaplain of catefoss em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em abril de 1348, em Catfoss, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 84 anos.

ru.Rise And Withernwick In Holderness, Engl: рис, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Fauconberg родился в 1264 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Walter de Fauconberge было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Brus, 36. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1348 году, в возрасте 84 лет,  он работал по профессии chaplain of catefoss в местности еркшир, Англия. Он умер апрель 1348 г. в местности катфосс, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 84 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1348, a la edad de 84 años, su ocupación registrada era chaplain of catefoss en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Murió en abril de 1348, en Catfoss, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años.
